name: autoresearch-guard
description: Guarded Codex research loops with evidence ledgers, deterministic audits, decision gates, and constrained /goal generation.

interface.longDescription: AutoResearch Guard helps Codex run research as constrained /goal loops. AI writes hypotheses, protocols, evidence reviews, and next-step decisions; bundled scripts only initialize state, render goals, record evidence, audit deterministic rule violations, check decisions, report status, and archive completed iterations.
defaultPrompt: $autoresearch-guard Prepare a guarded research /goal loop for this project.
$autoresearch-guard Audit the current research evidence and decision gate.
